name: the research facility NO.507
short_description: Take out your compass to find the tombs hidden deeply in the forest,LinHai Snowland and Gobi desert by your knowledge.Guns are your best friends.The rile,shot gun,machine gun with different swords can help you to defend various of enemies.
detailed_description:
Attention:
this game is working in progress, now It provides basic game features, and is released as an early access build. We expect to build this game world together with all the players of this game.


Key feature:
Extend content based on players’ feedback
Chinese elements
Rough art style
Own play soundtrack
Own play dubbing
Chinese version, no need to do translation
No particular gameplay
